title: Fix typo in README.md
description: The README has "recieve" instead of "receive" on line 42. Fix all typo instances.

title: Add .gitignore entry for .env.local
description: Environment files are being committed. Add .env.local and .env.*.local to .gitignore.

title: Remove unused import in utils.ts
description: ESLint reports unused import of `lodash` in src/utils.ts. Remove it.

title: Add alt text to all images in docs
description: Accessibility audit found 3 images without alt text in docs/getting-started.md.

title: Add input validation to POST /tasks endpoint
description: The POST /api/v1/tasks endpoint accepts any body without validation. Add zod schema validation for title (required, 1-200 chars), description (optional, max 5000 chars), priority (1-5).

title: Implement rate limiting for API endpoints
description: Add rate limiting to prevent abuse. Use a sliding window counter: 100 requests per minute per IP. Return 429 with Retry-After header when exceeded.

title: Add unit tests for priority queue
description: The priority queue in src/routing/queue.ts has no tests. Write tests covering: enqueue, dequeue by priority, delay-until, retry count, max retries, stale item cleanup.

title: Implement graceful shutdown
description: When receiving SIGTERM, the server should: 1) stop accepting new connections, 2) wait for active agent sessions to reach a checkpoint, 3) persist queue state, 4) exit cleanly.

title: Add structured logging with pino
description: Replace console.log/error calls with structured logging using pino. Add request ID tracking, log levels (debug/info/warn/error), and JSON output format.
